languages.text: "Пусть Омниссия дарует вам благословение за то, что помогли справиться с врагами Его! Вероятность нарушения универсальных законов в данной точке была мала, но технодуховенство требовало уточнить оценку до десятых в третьей степени".

"May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."
languages.original_text: "Пусть Омниссия дарует вам благословение за то, что помогли справиться с врагами Его! Вероятность нарушения универсальных законов в данной точке была мала, но технодуховенство требовало уточнить оценку до десятых в третьей степени".

languages.text: 「全知なる神が敵の破壊を助けたあなたに祝福を与えられますように！この時点で第9の普遍法則に違反する確率は低かったが、技術司祭はそれを3分の1の10分の1の精度で示すことを要求した」
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Ninth Universal Law at this point was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: 「全知なる神が敵の破壊を助けたあなたに祝福を与えられますように！この時点で第9の普遍法則に違反する確率は低かったが、技術司祭はそれを3分の1の10分の1の精度で示すことを要求した」

languages.text: «¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga por contribuir a la destrucción de sus enemigos! La probabilidad de que se vulnerara la Ley Universal era baja, pero el tecnoclérigo exigía que la estimación se especificara hasta una décima de tercio de grado».
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: «¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga por contribuir a la destrucción de sus enemigos! La probabilidad de que se vulnerara la Ley Universal era baja, pero el tecnoclérigo exigía que la estimación se especificara hasta una décima de tercio de grado».

languages.text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您，因您助祂歼灭敌寇！虽说此处违反普适准则的概率已然极低，但技术教士要求将估算值精确到三分之一度的十分之一。”
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您，因您助祂歼灭敌寇！虽说此处违反普适准则的概率已然极低，但技术教士要求将估算值精确到三分之一度的十分之一。”

languages.text: "Möge Euch der Omnissiah für die Hilfe bei der Vernichtung Seiner Feinde Seinen Segen gewähren! Die Wahrscheinlichkeit einer Verletzung der Universalgesetze war gering, aber die Techpriesterschaft verlangte eine Spezifizierung der Einschätzung auf ein Zehntel eines Drittelgrades."
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: "Möge Euch der Omnissiah für die Hilfe bei der Vernichtung Seiner Feinde Seinen Segen gewähren! Die Wahrscheinlichkeit einer Verletzung der Universalgesetze war gering, aber die Techpriesterschaft verlangte eine Spezifizierung der Einschätzung auf ein Zehntel eines Drittelgrades."

languages.text: "Hermesih, O'nun düşmanlarının yok edilmesine yardım ettiğiniz için size lütfunu bahşetsin! Bu noktada Evrensel Yasaların ihlal edilme olasılığı düşük olsa da tekno ruhban sınıfı, tahminin bir derecenin üçte birinin onda biri hassasiyetinde belirtilmesini talep etti."
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih, O'nun düşmanlarının yok edilmesine yardım ettiğiniz için size lütfunu bahşetsin! Bu noktada Evrensel Yasaların ihlal edilme olasılığı düşük olsa da tekno ruhban sınıfı, tahminin bir derecenin üçte birinin onda biri hassasiyetinde belirtilmesini talep etti."

languages.text: « Que l'Omnimessie vous bénisse pour votre contribution à la destruction de Ses ennemis ! La probabilité d'infraction de la Loi Universelle sur ce site était faible, mais le techno-clergé a exigé que l'estimation soit précisée au dixième du tiers d'un degré. »
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."
